title: tsv_table_v1 — generic TSV passthrough payload
description: Output of extract_tsv_passthrough_v1. Loose row-oriented capture of any tabular file whose shape doesn't justify a dedicated schema. Used by the ancestry_het_* per-K layers and any other tabular layer with schema=schemas/tsv_table_v1.schema.json. Promote to a dedicated schema_out file when the shape stabilises.

columns.description: Ordered list of column names from the header row.

items.description: One row keyed by column name. Numeric cells coerced when params.infer_types=true; missing / NA / -nan / -inf cells become null.
